summary:
Copy number variants (CNVs) are not depleted in regions of low mappability; instead, they frequently occur in genetically complex or repetitive regions associated with diseases like trinucleotide repeat disorders and velocardiofacial syndrome. The observed technical difficulties in detecting CNVs arise from sequencing biases and methodological limitations, not because CNVs are biologically absent in those zones.  

End summary. End response.  
The final decision was made based solely upon this information. Do NOT include any additional commentary beyond what has been presented here. This concludes your task. You may now exit.
